title: Astronomy for Mortals: Where infinity becomes understandable
author: Wordsus Team
description: A fascinating journey through the cosmos in 365 daily lessons. From the solar system to the far reaches of the observable universe, discover how space-time works, the stars and the great mysteries of astronomy explained in a simple way.

chapters.title: What is astronomy? An introduction to the cosmos
chapters.description: We begin our stellar journey by defining what exactly astronomy is, its fascinating history, and why observing the night sky captivates us so much.

chapters.title: The Sun: Our star, the heart of the solar system
chapters.description: Discover how our mother star works. We explore its composition, temperatures and how its enormous energy makes life on Earth possible.

chapters.title: The Moon: Our only and inseparable natural satellite
chapters.description: Learn the secrets of our natural satellite. We analyze its mysterious phases, the craters that adorn its surface and its influence on the tides.

chapters.title: Black holes: The light devourers of the universe
chapters.description: We demystify the most famous monsters in the cosmos. Learn what black holes are, how they form when stars die, and why nothing escapes.

chapters.title: Rocky planets: Close neighbors in our system
chapters.description: A detailed tour of Mercury, Venus, Earth and Mars. We analyze their solid surfaces, their atmospheres and what makes them planets so unique.
